rules.current_enrollware_classes: May appear as class/session offers when present in current Enrollware source data.
rules.approved_seed_offers: May appear only as hub offers after approved_for_public; they do not create standalone class landers.
rules.appointment_seed_offers: May appear as hub appointment offers when objective appointment rules pass; Enrollware presence is not required because Enrollware creates/groups the class when the appointment is claimed.
rules.unapproved_seed_offers: Remain needs-review or suppressed and do not become public.
rules.report_only: This report does not modify public pages, CTAs, Enrollware links, class landers, or schedule files.
